purpose: Locked Spiideo human-label regression set for the goal-detect decision layer. Eval chain changes against this fixed manifest — never a live DB query. Holdout = matches reviewed AFTER this declaration (the live queue at declare time and anything after); do not drain the queue into this freeze.
holdout_policy: Incoming review-queue stamps are HELD OUT for localizer v2 / kit-timing one-looks. The 141-stamp localizer corpus used in the 2026-07-24 refiner spike is SPENT; any v2 evaluates only on post-freeze held-out stamps.

original_8.method: Karim eyes-on of truncation-audit past-clip flags; zero new goals

new_4.method: DB past-clip cycle estimates (sub_anchor-20 > clipEnd via clipTruncation) resolved by nearest stamp ±45s OR explicit cycle_verdict=no_goal. Same flag class as 07-23 truncation audit.
